title: Watch: IShowSpeed loses it as Cristiano Ronaldo scores his first goal of the 2026 World Cup
summary_full: Cristiano Ronaldo's first goal at the 2026 FIFA World Cup ignited an explosive reaction from superfan IShowSpeed, whose stadium celebration went viral. The streamer's ecstatic display, fueled by his long-standing admiration for the Portuguese star, nearly overshadowed Ronaldo's brace against Uzbekistan. This moment highlights the increasing synergy between online personalities and major sporting events, captivating global audiences.
